title: AI SDK extraction stub pattern
rationale: Kept migration stubs for createAIService/resolveLanguageModel that throw at runtime but preserve TypeScript signatures. Prevents cap-adapter-server typecheck breakage until cap-ai-provider capability is created. @ai-sdk/* and ai packages removed from core/package.json.

content: Spec 55 life-system interfaces in packages/core/src/types/life-system.ts: Sensor<TSignal>, Signal, SensorSignal, SensorContext, Baseline, MemoryStore, Detector<TEvent,TResult>. SignalSource: event_bus | server | api | graphql | mcp | ui.

MemoryEngine (Spec 55 §4) in packages/core/src/life-system/memory-engine.ts: accepts MemoryStore interface, uses getSignals() extension method via duck-typing (Partial<InMemoryMemoryStore>) to avoid coupling interface to implementation. windowSize defaults to 30 days, driftThreshold defaults to 0.3 (30%). computeBaseline uses arithmetic mean; detectDrift uses |value - baseline| / max(|baseline|, 1).

InMemoryMemoryStore in packages/core/src/life-system/in-memory-memory-store.ts: implements MemoryStore interface + adds getSignals(opts?) extension. Baseline key = 'schema:metric'. getSignals filters by schema matching payload.schema OR signal.type, supports since/limit.
